metadata.name: Book a Shore Excursion for a Cruise

description: A passenger on an upcoming cruise wants to book a 'Dolphin Swim' shore excursion for one of their port days.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's cruise booking and the list of available excursions for their itinerary.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the booking and the list of available tours.

nodes.task_description: Check availability for the 'Dolphin Swim' excursion on the desired port day.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms there are spots available.

nodes.task_description: Book the excursion for the passenger and charge it to their onboard account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books the tour and adds the charge to the passenger's folio.
